category_sources: source_facts.description says extensible GTK system monitoring application; official homepage describes GKrellM as a stack of system monitors.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gkrellm; official homepage title and text use GKrellM.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface found, covering features, requirements, configuration, source, themes, and plugins.
repo_sources: Official homepage GKrellM Source section says git clone http://git.srcbox.net/gkrellm downloads the current source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a GTK system monitor; official homepage lists CPU, disk, network, memory, sensors, plugin support, and gkrellmd server mode.
